Title: Taken
Actors: Clive Standen, Jennifer Beals, Adam Goldberg
Plot: The series follows a former Green Beret, Bryan Mills, as he deals with a personal tragedy that shakes his world. As he fights to overcome the incident and exact revenge, Mills is pulled into a career as a deadly CIA operative, a job that awakens his very particular, and very dangerous, set of skills.
Language: English, Spanish, Russian, Ukrainian, French, Arabic, German, Chechen, Hebrew, Korean, Kurdish, Gaelic, Norwegian
